summary: Complete testing of enhanced Dashboard page for AMLGuard. 22/22 backend tests passed. All dashboard features working correctly including count-up animations, sparkline charts, animated donut chart, India heat map, live activity feed, integration status with Demo Mode badges, and API usage stats.

issues: Console warning: recharts ResponsiveContainer shows width/height warning during initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns 200
Backend: Stats has total_customers field (integer)
Backend: Stats has pending_reviews field (integer)
Backend: Stats has high_risk_customers field (integer)
Backend: Stats has open_cases field (integer)
Backend: Stats has risk_distribution with low/medium/high/unacceptable
Backend: Stats has screening_stats with sanctions_matches/pep_matches/adverse_media_hits
Backend: Stats has kyc_stats with total/verified/failed
Backend: Stats has cdd_breakdown with sdd/standard_cdd/edd
Backend: Stats has api_usage with total_api_calls/active_api_keys
Backend: Stats has integrations with signzy/opensanctions (mode field)
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/trends returns 200
Backend: Trends has trends array with 7 days of data
Backend: Each trend entry has date/customers/screenings/cases/risk fields
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/activity-feed returns 200
Backend: Activity feed has feed array with user_name/action/timestamp/action_type
Backend: Dashboard stats requires authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: Dashboard trends requires authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: Activity feed requires authentication (401 without auth)
Frontend: Dashboard page renders with data-testid='dashboard-page'
Frontend: Dashboard title 'Compliance Dashboard' displayed
Frontend: 4 stat cards render (Total Customers, Pending Reviews, High Risk, Open Cases)
Frontend: Stat cards show count-up animation from 0 to value
Frontend: Sparkline mini-charts visible next to each stat card
Frontend: Risk Distribution section shows animated donut chart (recharts PieChart)
Frontend: Donut chart shows Low/Medium/High segments with legend
Frontend: Donut chart shows total (28) in center
Frontend: Screening Alerts shows Sanctions Matches, PEP Matches, Adverse Media counts
Frontend: KYC & Due Diligence shows Verifications Run, Verified, Failed
Frontend: CDD Tiers shows SDD, Standard, EDD counts
Frontend: India heat map renders with city dots (Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, Chennai, Kolkata, etc.)
Frontend: India map has animated pulsing city dots
Frontend: Live Activity Feed shows recent events with user name, action, relative time
Frontend: Activity feed shows 15 feed items
Frontend: Integration Status shows 3 providers (Signzy, OpenSanctions, News API)
Frontend: All integrations show Demo Mode badge (yellow)
Frontend: Each integration has Connect button
Frontend: Connect button navigates to Settings page
Frontend: API Usage shows Total Calls (19) and Active Keys (2)
seed_data_creation: Demo data seeded on startup: 28 customers with risk distribution (Low: 15, Medium: 10, High: 3), 100 audit log entries for activity feed, demo screening records, demo cases. Integration status returns demo mode for all providers.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard page fully tested. All enhanced features working: (1) Count-up animations on stat cards using requestAnimationFrame with easing, (2) Sparkline mini-charts using recharts LineChart showing 7-day trends, (3) Animated donut chart using recharts PieChart with innerRadius for donut effect, (4) India heat map with SVG-based city dots and pulsing animation, (5) Live Activity Feed pulling from audit_logs collection with 15 recent events, (6) Integration Status showing Signzy/OpenSanctions/News API all in Demo Mode with Connect buttons, (7) API Usage showing Total Calls and Active Keys. Backend endpoints: GET /api/dashboard/stats, GET /api/dashboard/trends, GET /api/dashboard/activity-feed. All require authentication.

mocked_apis.integrations: Signzy, OpenSanctions, News API all return demo mode status - no actual external API calls

stat_cards.count_up_animation: Numbers animate from 0 to value using requestAnimationFrame

risk_distribution.segments: Low (15, green), Medium (10, yellow), High (3, red)

india_heat_map.dot_sizes: Vary by screening count (larger = more screenings)
